text.message: yall are really bad at doing extortion
i usually dont like to do it
but black was the first to did it
cuz you have best position long term
When black take the spot is over
this is why i rob him
first he need to get port
man if you'd just have traded on my turn when i was offering these trades...
continue to rob the player with 2 points and 3 resources
if you rob me here, you start something
and that something makes us both lose
doesnt make it the right play
extortion doesnt give you carte blanche to make terrible plays
you extort me all game wiyh your proposal trades
i dont even know what that means
i havent robbed you since the first rob of the game
man i needed a brick really hard
i was willing to trade for it
but you wanted your way or the highway
cant say i didnt warn you
oj imagine you have port now
focus me all game then and lets lose together
that is exactly what i promised to do
give up of a game because of a rob
its giving up if he solo block the last player every time
tbh you are his army competitor
you are talking that you are last???
i mean oj is just crushing us all
you said i would regret if i block you when i offered a nb for a brick that you had
i trade the nb with oj
you extorted me, not the other way around
trading a nb for a card its not extortion
that is the definition of extortion
so who is the last black??
red solo block me when i had 2 points
leaving oj unblocked at that point was malpractice
not giving two cards to save the game
rather oj take roads not you
who is rob if not you black??
i am on 6 with road. how many points do you think road gives oj?
tell me why you prefer oj with road
because that is one of the worst takes i've heard
cuz you or black will take army in the future
dude! oj almost has army already!
well black i thought you were the worst player here, but blue is really giving you a run for your money
blue said hard city for oj
blue would rather oj have road for 7 points with 3 devs and a city
than me have road for 6 points, no devs and no city
nah ill give you your wish
want you to realize how bad ur analysis is
